items.claim: Max Holloway will not attempt to wrestle Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max is not going to wrestle him.

items.claim: Charles Oliveira is an elite grappler.
Conor McGregor has not fought in five years.
Conor McGregor has not won a fight since Donald Cerrone.
items.quote: you haven't won a fight since Donald Cerrone.

items.claim: Max Holloway has been consistently active against top-tier competition.
items.quote: Max has been active. He's been fighting the best in the world.

items.claim: Max Holloway holds a win over the current lightweight champion.
items.quote: He has a win against the current lightweight champion.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's fighting style is stylistically favorable against Max Holloway.
items.quote: Stylistically though, I always thought Connor has a good path to beat Max
